rect.style: animation:borderFlow 4s linear forwards, rgbBorder 5s linear 4s infinite

text.style: animation:fadeUp .5s ease 0.10s both, glowBlue 2.5s ease-in-out 0.30s infinite
animation:fadeUp .5s ease 0.25s both, glowGreen 2.5s ease-in-out 0.45s infinite
animation:fadeUp .5s ease 0.40s both, glowPurple 2.5s ease-in-out 0.60s infinite
animation:fadeUp .5s ease 0.55s both, glowGold 2.5s ease-in-out 0.75s infinite
animation:fadeUp .5s ease 0.70s both, glowOrange 2.5s ease-in-out 0.90s infinite
